title: Basic JavaScript Booleans and Comparisons
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Booleans and Comparisons. Focus on implementing Boolean primitive and object correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Booleans and Comparisons
description: Create a function that uses Boolean primitive and object and Truthy and falsy values together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Booleans and Comparisons Project
description: Build a small application that applies Boolean primitive and object, Truthy and falsy values, Equality (== vs ===) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Booleans and Comparisons
description: The following code has bugs related to Boolean primitive and object. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Booleans and Comparisons
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Boolean primitive and object and Truthy and falsy values.
